overview: This lizard appears to be an albino Anolis capito (big-headed anole). It is characterized by its nearly translucent or white skin, a significant lack of melanin, and distinct reddish eyes. Albino anoles are extremely rare in the wild because their lack of camouflage makes them easy prey. They generally have a very short life expectancy in nature. Wild Herps +4 5 sites Albino Anole – Anole Annals
